mapper.sql: id, user_id, role, operation, method, params, ip, location, time, duration
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_log(user_id, role, operation, method, params, ip, location, time, duration) VALUES(#{userId}, #{role}, #{operation}, #{method}, #{params}, #{ip}, #{location}, #{time}, #{duration})
mapper.select:
SELECT sl.id, sl.user_id, sl.role, sl.operation, sl.method, sl.params, sl.ip, sl.location, sl.time, sl.duration, CASE WHEN sl.role = 'ADMIN' THEN (SELECT name FROM admin WHERE id = sl.user_id) WHEN sl.role = 'TEACHER' THEN (SELECT name FROM teacher WHERE id = sl.user_id) WHEN sl.role = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT name FROM student WHERE id = sl.user_id) ELSE NULL END as userName, CASE WHEN sl.role = 'ADMIN' THEN (SELECT username FROM admin WHERE id = sl.user_id) WHEN sl.role = 'TEACHER' THEN (SELECT username FROM teacher WHERE id = sl.user_id) WHEN sl.role = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT username FROM student WHERE id = sl.user_id) ELSE NULL END as username FROM system_log sl
AND sl.role = #{role}
AND sl.operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operation}, '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM admin WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teacher WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))
AND ( (sl.role = 'ADMIN' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM admin WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))) OR (sl.role = 'TEACHER' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teacher WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))) OR (sl.role = 'STUDENT' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student WHERE id = sl.user_id AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))) )
ORDER BY sl.time DESC
